title: Accept stablecoin payments
excerpt: Start accepting stablecoins by enabling the Crypto payment method. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Checkout](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/accept-stablecoin-payments.md?payment-ui=checkout) - [Checkout Sessions API](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/accept-stablecoin-payments.md?payment-ui=elements&api-integration=checkout) - [Payment Intents API](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/accept-stablecoin-payments.md?payment-ui=elements&api-integration=paymentintents) - [Direct API](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/accept-stablecoin-payments.md?payment-ui=direct-api)
